sizing_rule.note: Dollar-cost averaging: divide total capital into N equal portions deployed over N equal time intervals instead of lump sum. Formula: Position_Size = Total_Capital / Number_of_Time_Periods. This is a capital deployment schedule (capital management) rather than a per-trade risk rule.

source_rule_text: Dollar average money into a trading account over time rather than deploying capital all at once to smooth entry and improve average purchase price
